title: Bind every controlled change to an authorized request
description: Require each change to reference an approved change request so the trail links why, who, and what.
body: Use when a change to a regulated system is proposed. Do not allow an unlinked change that has no recorded business or operational justification. Actions: require the commit/deploy to reference an approved change-request id, verify the request was authorized before the change, and store the linkage as evidence connecting request, approval, change, and deploy. Validation signals include a gate that rejects a deploy with no linked authorized request and a traceability report joining request to artifact. Risk boundary: an emergency/break-glass change still must create a retroactive request and reach a human reviewer; an unlinked change to a controlled system is blocking.
